title: No Game No Life Custom GUI Pack
description: This is a GUI packed themed towards the show "No Game No Life". I have taken the opportunity to experiment with adding different pictures to each container.
body: **![](https://i.imgur.com/COaYlNw.png)** **Introduction:** This GUI-only resource pack is themed around the show "No Game No Life." It’s designed to be used with other resource packs; just place it on top of your existing one. The pack features a fresh look for various UI elements, including a new hot bar and updated images for containers. The chosen color palette is purple and pink, but I’m open to exploring other color schemes like gray and white if there’s interest. **Community Engagement:** Feel free to leave comments or report any issues so I can make the necessary updates. **If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.** [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) **Feature Highlights:** - **Hud:** ![Hud](https://i.imgur.com/Ljhzzcs.png) - **Settings:** ![Settings](https://i.imgur.com/ec0h4WN.png) - **Creative Menu:** ![Creative Menu](https://i.imgur.com/c3FMo7h.png) - **Inventory:** ![Inventory](https://i.imgur.com/2zlvqST.png) - **Crafting Table:** ![Crafting Table](https://i.imgur.com/fTcDrLX.png) - **Anvil:** ![Anvil](https://i.imgur.com/cau4cBl.png) - **Brewing Stand:** ![Brewing Stand](https://i.imgur.com/yl3TN3a.png) - **Chest:** ![Chest](https://i.imgur.com/fG8B9cs.png) - **Beacon Menu:** ![Beacon Menu](https://i.imgur.com/zSTmfwc.png) - **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Villager Trading Menu](https://i.imgur.com/NQJf9e3.png) **Additional Resources:** - Explore more packs on [ListarMC](https://listarmc.com/) - Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and participate in anime discussions. **Thank you for your support! ❤️**
